intent: Ensure the upload dialog keeps visible spacing from mobile browser viewport edges.
assumptions: The bug is isolated to upload dialog viewport sizing and safe-area spacing.
Mobile browsers may expose a visual viewport smaller than static vh units.
CSS contract tests are suitable for regression coverage, with visual verification as a separate check.
risks: jsdom does not perform real layout calculations.
Too much mobile spacing can reduce usable dialog content height.
Existing user change in docs/testing-strategy.md must remain untouched.
steps: Add a failing regression test for dynamic viewport and safe-area spacing.
Update UploadDialog.css to reserve safe viewport gaps on all sides.
Run frontend lint/build checks where feasible.
Document the permanent constraint and quality score.
